title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 40.310 - Arrest, resists or breaks — escape from confinement — court-martial
text:
40.310.  Arrest, resists or breaks — escape from confinement — court-martial. — Any person subject to sections 40.005 to 40.490 who resists apprehension or breaks arrest or who escapes from physical custody, restraint, or confinement lawfully imposed shall be punished as a court-martial may direct.
(L. 1984 H.B. 1035 § 96)
